test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to align wire-contract naming with code (`ResultType` instead of `ResultKind`) and to reflect the current v2 legacy-snapshot rejection message text.
Updated .factory/library/environment.md with portable macOS memory-check guidance (`/usr/bin/time -l` or `ps -o rss`) to avoid Linux-only `/proc/*` probes during informal large-CSV memory validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require every completed feature entry in mission features.json to include explicit worker-session linkage (or an equivalent canonical handoff reference), even when work lands early inside another feature commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both m4-duplicate-filea-to-duplicate-file-a-rename and m4-collapse-mapping-request-response-frontend are marked completed with empty workerSessionIds, forcing review evidence reconstruction from unrelated feature handoffs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen worker/validator guidance so features that fulfill agent-browser-backed assertions must include matching interactive evidence (or a documented blocker with fallback evidence) in the originating handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: For m4-collapse-mapping-request-response-frontend and m4-duplicate-filea-to-duplicate-file-a-rename, recovered handoffs lacked direct agent-browser evidence for compare-response wire assertions despite fulfills linkage to contract checks.

rejectedObservations.observation: A second traceability observation repeating missing workerSessionIds for another early-completed m4 feature.
A second skills observation about missing agent-browser compare-flow evidence for early-completed m4 work.
